title: Retirement
goalDescription: Building personal savings alongside SSNIT or pension contributions, for the retirement you actually want.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for your personal retirement savings, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Desired personal retirement fund
questions.help: This is on top of SSNIT or any workplace pension — a rough figure is fine.

questions.label: Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: A long time horizon can typically absorb more growth-oriented assumptions than a short-term goal, but this is still just a planning assumption.

yearsErrorMessage: Target retirement age must be greater than your current age.
